# Brammer, Begnaud, & Lattimore CPAs & Consultants

> > Brammer, Begnaud, & Lattimore CPAs & Consultants is a full-service accounting and consulting firm based in Port Arthur, Texas, serving Southeast Texas since 1950. They work with physicians, dentists, restaurant owners, agricultural businesses, and small and new business owners who want to hand off accounting, payroll, and tax work so they can focus on running their operations. What sets them apart: fixed monthly fee bundled services, a secure online platform for real-time financial visibility, year-round tax support, and CFO-level guidance at a fraction of typical cost. Their approach stays approachable, reassuring, and jargon-free — accounting made accessible, not stressful.
